home.badge: Built on Stellar · Trustless Work escrow
home.description: PyMEs get working capital, investors earn 8-15% APR on USDC deals, and suppliers receive guaranteed milestone payments - all secured by non-custodial escrow on Stellar.

auth.loginDescription: Sign in to your account to continue
auth.tagline: Supply chain finance for PyMEs, investors, and suppliers
auth.signUpDescription: Choose your role and fill in your details
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.continueWithPollarShort: Google, GitHub, email OTP or wallet — no seed phrase
auth.signInWithPasswordInstead: Or sign in with email and password
auth.pollarSignUpHint: Creates your Mercato account automatically after you authenticate with Pollar.

deals.title: Deals
deals.description: Browse and fund real supply chain orders. Each deal is secured by non-custodial escrow on Stellar.
deals.noDealsEmpty: No deals have been created yet. Check back soon or create the first one from your dashboard.
deals.noDealsFiltered: No deals match your current filters. Try adjusting your search or status selection.

createDeal.title: Create New Deal
createDeal.description: Set up your purchase order and let investors fund it through secure escrow
createDeal.walletRequired: Please connect your Stellar wallet before creating a deal.
createDeal.platformMissing: Platform address is not configured. Contact support.
createDeal.invalidMilestones: Set each milestone name and adjust percentages so they total 100%.
createDeal.success: Deal created and escrow deployed successfully!
createDeal.supplierWalletMissing: Selected supplier company does not have a Stellar wallet address. Ask the supplier to add it in Settings.
createDeal.basicsDescription: Choose a category, supplier, and product; price comes from the supplier catalog
createDeal.catalogEmpty: No products in catalog yet. Ask suppliers to add products in their profile.
createDeal.selectCategoryFirst: Select a category first or no suppliers available
createDeal.noSuppliersCategory: No suppliers with products in this category
createDeal.descriptionPlaceholder: Brief description or notes for this order...
createDeal.supplierTermsDescription: Who will supply the product and what are the payment terms?
createDeal.repayHint: This is how long you have to repay investors after delivery
createDeal.yieldHint: Extra percentage points on top of the base rate (from term and deal size), up to {max}% - increases what you repay but makes the deal more attractive to investors
createDeal.bonusCapped: Applied bonus is capped at {max}% APR.
createDeal.baseAprLine: Base {apr}% APR (from {days} days and deal amount)
createDeal.milestonesDescription: Define when the supplier gets paid from escrow
createDeal.standardMilestonesBody: Most deals use a 50/50 split: 50% after shipment confirmation, and 50% after delivery. Add more milestones if your supplier needs extra release points - percentages must total 100%.

dashboard.adminPendingSingle: 1 milestone needs your approval to release funds on-chain.
dashboard.adminPendingPlural: {count} milestones need your approval to release funds on-chain.
dashboard.supplierCardDescAll: Your catalog visible to SMBs creating deals
dashboard.supplierCardDescPickCompany: Select a company above to see its catalog
dashboard.supplierNoProductsCompany: No products yet for this company.
dashboard.supplierHintNoCompanies: Add a company to set up your product catalog.
dashboard.supplierHintPickCompany: Select a company above to view products.
dashboard.noDealsPyme: Create your first deal to start securing supply chain financing.
dashboard.noDealsInvestor: Browse open deals to fund your first investment.
dashboard.noDealsSupplierOnboard: Add a company and products so SMBs can create deals with you.
dashboard.noDealsSupplier: Deals assigned to your companies will appear here once investors fund them.
dashboard.noDealsAdmin: No deals on the platform yet.

roles.pymeTagline: Create deals and secure supply chain financing
roles.investorTagline: Fund deals and earn yield on your capital
roles.adminTagline: Oversee platform operations and milestone approvals

actions.rampDescription: Move money in and out via on-ramp providers
actions.createDescription: Request supply chain financing for a purchase
actions.browseInvestorsDescription: See funded deals and active investors
actions.manageCompaniesDescription: Update your company profile and catalog
actions.viewActiveDealsDescription: See deals assigned to your companies
actions.confirmDeliveriesDescription: Accept orders and confirm delivery milestones
actions.browseAllDealsDescription: View the full platform deal history

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account settings and profile information
settings.profileDescription: Update your profile details and personal information
settings.userTypeLockedHint: User type cannot be changed after registration
settings.countryHint: Your business or primary operation country (LATAM)
settings.walletAddressHint: Your Stellar wallet address for receiving/sending payments
settings.stakeHint: Visible trust commitment in MERCATO Vault (v1 stores the amount; score impact is deferred).
settings.bioPlaceholder: Tell us about yourself or your business
settings.supplierNoticePrefix: As a supplier, manage your products and categories from your
settings.supplierNoticeSuffix: page (also available in Quick Actions on your dashboard).
settings.stakeInvalid: Stake amount must be a number greater than or equal to 0
settings.stakeError: Error updating stake signal. Please try again.
settings.profileError: Error updating profile. Please try again.
